race.comment: KINGMAKER NZ (7) has the hoof on the till after placing in his three starts so far this campaign. Chased topliner Don Hugo when beaten less than 4m into second last week and comes back to a distance where he owns a good record. Should be hitting his peak fourth up so can break through. RIPP (10) draws wide but came from a similar barrier to finish only 2.4m off Miracle Mile hopeful Pinseeker last time. That was his first outing off a let-up so should be better for it. NERANO NZ (8) didn't fire during his stint in WA but is back in the Jason Grimson yard and his best form measures right up here. I BREAK THE LINE (2) came from the back row to find winning form at Newcastle last start. This is stronger but he draws to advantage. CAPTAIN BELLASARIO (11) is up in grade but racing well, winning two of his past three starts at this circuit and distance.
